The '''Battle of Kaal''' was a [[List of battles/Legends|battle]] of the [[Imperial Civil War]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]. Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] represented by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Uther Kermen]], and [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Utoxx Prentioch]] clashed over control of the food-rich world [[Kaal/Legends|Kaal]].

Diplomats were assigned to reason out a settlement; however, after some time, Kermen grew tired. He used his flagship, ''[[Belligerent]]'', to attack Prentioch's flagship, the aptly-named ''[[Prentioch]]''. The battle was a stalemate and both ships, too damaged to continue, withdrew. As a result, the New Republic took command of Kaal.
